name: Marked for Death
description: Whenever an enemy creature is destroyed, deal 1 damage to the enemy Nexus.

name: Soul Tear
description: When one of your creatures is destroyed, add a random creature of the same magicka cost to your hand.

name: First Lesson
description: The first action you play each turn costs 1 less magicka.

name: Battleground
description: Creatures you play into the Field Lane have Cover until they attack.

name: Harbinger's Call
description: At the start of each of your turns, if you have no creatures in play, summon a random 1-cost creature.

name: Holy Ground
description: At the start of each of your turns, your creatures in the Field Lane gain +0/+1.

name: Prophet's Sight
description: When a rune breaks, look at the top 3 cards of your deck and choose one to draw. The others are shuffled back. If you choose a Prophecy card, it triggers.

name: Runic Ward
description: The first time a rune breaks, summon a 2/4 Guard.

name: Fortified Spirit
description: Your runes break 1 damage sooner, causing more card draws and Prophecy triggers.
